steps.title: Augment start symbol
steps.description: Introduce a fresh start symbol so ε handling stays standard and the original start can be normalized safely.

steps.title: Eliminate ε-productions
steps.description: Generate nullable variants and remove empty productions everywhere except the fresh start symbol.

steps.title: Eliminate unit productions
steps.description: Replace renaming chains with the non-unit productions they reach.

steps.title: Remove useless symbols
steps.description: Remove non-productive and inaccessible symbols so the grammar is minimal before the CNF rewrite stage.
notes: Productive symbols: A, B, C, D, S, S0
Reachable symbols: A, B, D, S0

steps.title: Isolate terminals
steps.description: Replace terminals that appear inside long productions with fresh pre-terminal symbols.

steps.title: Binarize long productions
steps.description: Break productions longer than two symbols into a chain of binary rules.
notes: Helpers introduced: H1, H2, H3, H4, H5, H6

steps.title: Final cleanup
steps.description: Remove non-productive and inaccessible symbols so the grammar is minimal before the CNF rewrite stage.
notes: Productive symbols: A, B, D, H1, H2, H3, H4, H5, H6, S0, T_a, T_b
Reachable symbols: A, B, D, H1, H2, H3, H4, H5, H6, S0, T_a, T_b
